title: Rotatable Sculk
description: Sculk blocks generate & place in any direction
body:
> **NOTE:** _This mod is packaged as part of [Great Big World](https://modrinth.com/mod/great-big-world) and was made a standalone mod so that players can enjoy it separately. Do not download both with the intent of using them together._
> 
# Rotatable Sculk
A simple mod that makes Sculk Sensors & Sculk Shriekers rotatable in all directions. They can be placed & will generate this way.

It's a nice visual change that makes Sculk more alien and... sculkier. This will make Ancient Cities harder to clear, as Shriekers & Sensors can generate in out-of-reach areas.

![Sculkier Sculk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fad4db253547d871f607faada5d5cdb0de5665fc_0.webp)

> _This mod is free to use in modpacks with credit._
